---
title: Meet the team
author:
  - name: Isha Omer
  - name: Lexi Payne
  - name: Camden Chin
  - name: David Boham
---

This project was developed by **\Team GGPLOT** For [STA 199: Introduction to Data Science](https://sta199-s26.github.io/) at Duke University.
The team is comprised of the following team members.


-   Isha Omer: Junior from Kinston, North Carolina, studying Neuroscience. She does not have a LinkedIn </3
-   Lexi Payne: Junior from Montreal, Canada studying Neuroscience. This is her LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/alexandra-payne-9b1220292   
-   **David Boham**: Junior from Houston, Texas studying Computer Science. This is his LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dboham/
-   **Camden Chin**: Senior from New York City studying Computer Science and Visual Media. This is his LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/camden-chin/. 

   ...
